courses.title: Python Foundations for Data Science
courses.shortCapability: Build, debug, validate, transform, and summarise structured data using a small Python program.
courses.learnerFit: New to programming, nearly new, or rebuilding weak Python fundamentals.

courses.title: Applied Data Analysis with Python
courses.shortCapability: Clean, explore, visualise, and explain an unfamiliar tabular dataset using reproducible workflows.
courses.learnerFit: Comfortable with variables, conditions, loops, collections, functions, files, and basic debugging.

courses.title: Practical Machine Learning Foundations
courses.shortCapability: Build, evaluate, and critique a predictive model through honest baselines and error analysis.
courses.learnerFit: Able to independently clean, explore, and visualise tabular datasets.

courses.title: Generative AI Application Development
courses.shortCapability: Build grounded, structured, testable applications around language models, retrieval, and bounded tools.
courses.learnerFit: Comfortable writing Python applications and working with APIs, JSON, error handling, testing, and Git.

courses.title: Engineering Reliable AI Systems
courses.shortCapability: Engineer an AI workflow with operational controls for security, observability, maintenance, and governance.
courses.learnerFit: Already built an AI or ML application, with strong software-engineering or platform foundations.
